name: Category: Initialization and Cleanup Errors
description: This is a CWE category (not a specific weakness) that groups weaknesses related to initialization and cleanup behaviors. Members include CWE-212, CWE-454, CWE-455, CWE-459, CWE-1051, CWE-1052, and CWE-1188. It should not be used to map real-world vulnerabilities.
